recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Thelma
recommendations.overview: A college student starts to experience extreme seizures. She soon learns that the violent episodes are a symptom of inexplicable abilities.

recommendations.title: Reprise
recommendations.overview: Fueled by literary aspirations and youthful exuberance, two competitive friends endure the pangs of love, depression, and burgeoning careers.

recommendations.title: Oslo, August 31st
recommendations.overview: A recovering drug addict is granted a day’s leave from rehab and returns to Oslo, where he reconnects with friends, faces the weight of his past, and struggles with uncertainty about his future. Over the course of one day, he drifts through encounter

recommendations.title: Louder Than Bombs

recommendations.title: After the Thin Man
recommendations.overview: Nick and Nora Charles investigate when Nora's cousin reports her disreputable husband is missing, and find themselves in a mystery involving the shady owners of a popular nightclub, a singer and her dark brother, the cousin's forsaken true love, and

recommendations.title: Past Lives
recommendations.overview: After decades apart, childhood friends Nora and Hae Sung are reunited in New York for one fateful weekend as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

recommendations.title: The Divine Order
recommendations.overview: Nora is a young housewife and mother, living in a quaint little village with her husband and their two sons. The Swiss countryside is untouched by the major social upheavals the movement of 1968 has brought about. Nora’s life is not affected either;

recommendations.title: Playground
recommendations.overview: When Nora witnesses Abel being bullied by other kids, she rushes to protect him by warning their father. But Abel forces her to remain silent. Caught in a conflict of loyalty, Nora will ultimately try to find her place, torn between children's and ad

recommendations.title: Sunset Boulevard
recommendations.overview: A hack screenwriter writes a screenplay for a former silent film star who has faded into Hollywood obscurity.
